# Prime Period Theory (PPT)

Prime Period Theory is a descriptive music theory framework grounded in prime-generated periodic relationships.

## AI Agent Instructions

The authoritative specification for this framework is formatted as an OKF (Open Knowledge Format) Knowledge Bundle.

The complete bundle is available in raw Markdown format at the `/okf/` path on this site. You can use these files to understand the framework's architecture, concepts, and diacritic system.

- **Entry Point**: [/okf/index.md](/okf/index.md)
- **Foundations**: [/okf/foundations/index.md](/okf/foundations/index.md)
- **Uniform Solfège**: [/okf/uniform-solfege/index.md](/okf/uniform-solfege/index.md)

All relative markdown links within these files correspond directly to the `/okf/` path structure.
